summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MarocSphere MVP. Most features working correctly with one critical AI budget issue.

critical_bugs.issue: OpenAI API budget exceeded - litellm.BadRequestError: Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0020050000000000003, Max budget: 0.001

minor_issues.issue: Authorization header not properly handled in query parameter format
minor_issues.impact: Minor - user authentication works via headers

integration_issues.issue: Generate button works but fails due to backend budget limits

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections (hero, trust bar, destinations, how-it-works, features, testimonials, CTA)
Navigation works correctly between all pages
AI chat functionality (working with real responses)
Interactive map with Leaflet integration and landmark filtering
Safety dashboard with real-time score and emergency features
Landmarks API returns 12 landmarks with filtering
Safety report API with mocked score generation
Form validations and interactions on Concierge page
Footer with emergency numbers and navigation links
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: OpenAI API budget has been exceeded for Emergent LLM key. Current cost (0.002005) exceeds max budget (0.001). This blocks AI itinerary generation and potentially AI chat. Please check/increase the budget limit or provide a new API key with higher limits.
